items.briefing:
Australian organisations have been warned that quantum computing poses a growing threat to current encryption standards, meaning sensitive data protected today could potentially be cracked in the future as quantum technology matures. Separately, with the FIFA World Cup approaching, the FBI is warning of fake official-looking FIFA websites designed to steal money and personal details — Australians purchasing tickets or merchandise online should be especially cautious.

**Practical tip:** Before entering payment details on any event or ticketing website, double-check the URL carefully and go directly to the official FIFA site rather than clicking links in emails or social media posts.

featured.title: Australia warned over quantum cyber security risks
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure faces years-long encryption vulnerability window against quantum threats.
